languages.text: "Серенада Шварц? Что же... После помилования она сама подала прошение о своей сервиторизации и отправлении в Сектум Бионика, дабы службой искупить свой поступок". {n}Вивисектор поджимает губы. На миг его лицо становится жестким.{/n} "Я счел правильным приставить получившегося медицинского сервитора к рабочему столу Ферренца".

traits.locale_text: "Серенада Шварц? Что же... После помилования она сама подала прошение о своей сервиторизации и отправлении в Сектум Бионика, дабы службой искупить свой поступок". {n}Вивисектор поджимает губы. На миг его лицо становится жестким.{/n} "Я счел правильным приставить получившегося медицинского сервитора к рабочему столу Ферренца".

languages.text: "Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."
languages.original_text: "Серенада Шварц? Что же... После помилования она сама подала прошение о своей сервиторизации и отправлении в Сектум Бионика, дабы службой искупить свой поступок". {n}Вивисектор поджимает губы. На миг его лицо становится жестким.{/n} "Я счел правильным приставить получившегося медицинского сервитора к рабочему столу Ферренца".

After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."

"Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."

"Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."

languages.text: 「セレナーダ・シュワルツか。そうだな。赦免された彼女は自ら、贖罪のためにセクター・ビオニカに送られる医療用サービターになるよう請願したのだ。」{n}解剖師は唇を固め、一瞬、目を鋭くする。{/n}「その結果生まれた医療用サービターを、フェレンツの机に配属するのは当然だろう」
languages.original_text: "Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."

languages.text: "Serenada Schwartz'a mı? Şey... Affedildikten sonra suçunun kefaretini hizmetle ödemek üzere bizzat hizmetörleştirilip Sektör Biyonika'ya gönderilmeyi talep etti." {n}Dudaklarını birbirine bastıran Dirikesimci'nin gözleri bir anlığına sertleşiyor.{/n} "Ortaya çıkan sıhhiye hizmetörünün Ferrenz'in masasına atanmasının doğru olacağını düşündüm."
languages.original_text: "Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."

traits.locale_text: "Serenada Schwartz'a mı? Şey... Affedildikten sonra suçunun kefaretini hizmetle ödemek üzere bizzat hizmetörleştirilip Sektör Biyonika'ya gönderilmeyi talep etti." {n}Dudaklarını birbirine bastıran Dirikesimci'nin gözleri bir anlığına sertleşiyor.{/n} "Ortaya çıkan sıhhiye hizmetörünün Ferrenz'in masasına atanmasının doğru olacağını düşündüm."

languages.text: “瑟琳娜达·施瓦茨？嗯……她被赦免后，主动请求被改造成机仆并派遣至仿生区，希望通过服役来赎罪。”{n}解剖者双唇紧抿，眼神骤然冷峻。{/n}我认为将改造后的医疗机仆分配至费伦茨的工作台，是恰当的安排。”
languages.original_text: "Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."

traits.locale_text: “瑟琳娜达·施瓦茨？嗯……她被赦免后，主动请求被改造成机仆并派遣至仿生区，希望通过服役来赎罪。”{n}解剖者双唇紧抿，眼神骤然冷峻。{/n}我认为将改造后的医疗机仆分配至费伦茨的工作台，是恰当的安排。”

languages.text: "Serenada Schwartz? Nun ... Nach ihrer Begnadigung bat sie selbst darum, servitorisiert und in den Sektor Bionica zurückgeschickt zu werden, um dort für ihre Verbrechen zu büßen." {n}Der Vivisektor presst die Lippen zusammen und seine Miene verhärtet sich für einen kurzen Moment.{/n} "Ich hielt es nur für richtig, den daraus resultierenden Medicae-Servitor Ferrenz zuzuteilen."
languages.original_text: "Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."

traits.locale_text: "Serenada Schwartz? Nun ... Nach ihrer Begnadigung bat sie selbst darum, servitorisiert und in den Sektor Bionica zurückgeschickt zu werden, um dort für ihre Verbrechen zu büßen." {n}Der Vivisektor presst die Lippen zusammen und seine Miene verhärtet sich für einen kurzen Moment.{/n} "Ich hielt es nur für richtig, den daraus resultierenden Medicae-Servitor Ferrenz zuzuteilen."

languages.text: « Serenada Schwartz ? Ma foi... Après avoir été graciée, elle a demandé à ce qu'on la servitorise avant de l'affecter au secteur Bionica où elle compte expier son crime à la force de ses bras. » {n}Le vivisecteur pince les lèvres, et son regard se durcit l'espace de quelques instants.{/n} « Il m'a paru tout naturel que le servitor médical résultant de la procédure soit préposé au bureau de Ferrenz. »
languages.original_text: "Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."

traits.locale_text: « Serenada Schwartz ? Ma foi... Après avoir été graciée, elle a demandé à ce qu'on la servitorise avant de l'affecter au secteur Bionica où elle compte expier son crime à la force de ses bras. » {n}Le vivisecteur pince les lèvres, et son regard se durcit l'espace de quelques instants.{/n} « Il m'a paru tout naturel que le servitor médical résultant de la procédure soit préposé au bureau de Ferrenz. »

languages.text: «¿Serenada Schwartz? Bueno... Tras recibir su perdón, pidió ser sometida a servidorización y enviada al Sector Bionica, para expiar su crimen mediante su servicio». {n}El Vivisector aprieta los labios y, por un momento, su mirada se endurece.{/n} «Consideré apropiado asignar el servidor de medicae resultante a la unidad de Ferrenz».
languages.original_text: "Serenada Schwartz? Well... After her pardon, she herself petitioned to be servitorised and sent to the Sector Bionica, so that she might atone for her crime through service." {n}The Vivisector presses his lips together, his eyes hardening for a moment.{/n} "I thought it only right that the resulting medicae servitor be assigned to Ferrenz's desk."
